messages.noPluginsDesc: Install plugins from catalog or create your own

localInstall.title: Install local plugin
localInstall.description: Enter the path to the plugin folder on the server

githubInstall.title: Install from GitHub
githubInstall.description: Paste a public GitHub repository link. The repository must contain a valid package.json for the plugin.
githubInstall.previewStepDescription: Review the repository, choose a version if needed, and install the plugin.
githubInstall.urlHint: Paste a direct link to the GitHub repository. The preview will open on the next step.
githubInstall.versionHint: Leave the latest branch state selected for the default install flow, or pick a release tag.
githubInstall.noReadme: This repository does not expose a README through the GitHub API.
githubInstall.previewHint: Load the repository preview to choose a release tag before installation.

createDialog.title: Create new plugin
createDialog.description: Enter a name for your new plugin. The name must be unique.
createDialog.invalidNameFormat: Invalid name format. Name must consist of letters, numbers and hyphens, but cannot start or end with a hyphen.
createDialog.enterValidName: Please enter a valid plugin name.
